name: Agrippina
troparia: (Tone 4) Your lamb, Agrippina, O Jesus, cries in a loud voice:* “You, O my Bridegroom, I love; and, seeking You, I undergo martyrdom.* And with You I am crucified and buried in Your baptism,* and I suffer for Your sake that I may reign with You.* And I die on Your behalf that I may live in You.* Receive me as a spotless sacrifice,* sacrificed for You with love.”* Through her intercession in Your mercy save our souls.
kontakia: (Tone 4) The radiant day of your shining virtues has arrived.* On this day the Church of God honors you* and calls all to cry out joyfully:* Rejoice, O virgin and martyr, most honorable Agrippina.
